zh.lifeSummary: 當Jolanthe von Jülich於大約1330年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 波海姆時，她的父親Gottfried von Jülich31歲，母親Elisabeth von Kleve23歲。她於大約1349年與Frederick VII von Leiningen在德國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年10月31日享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jolanthe von Jülich于大约1330年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可萊斯 波海姆时，她的父亲Gottfried von Jülich31岁，母亲Elisabeth von Kleve23岁。她于大约1349年与Frederick VII von Leiningen在德国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年10月31日享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Jolanthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern coinage based on Greek iolē ‘violet’ + anthos ‘flower’. It is known chiefly as the name of the eponymous fairy heroine of a Gilbert and Sullivan opera, first performed in 1882 .

en.lifeSummary: When Jolanthe von Jülich was born about 1330, in Bergheim, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Gottfried von Jülich, was 31 and her mother, Elisabeth von Kleve, was 23. She married Frederick VII von Leiningen about 1349, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 31 October 1387, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jolanthe von Jülich est née environ 1330, à Kreis Bergheim, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Gottfried von Jülich, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Kleve, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Frederick VII von Leiningen environ 1349, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1387, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Honingen, Pfalz, Bavaria, Germany: Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Jolanthe von Jülich um 1330 in Kreis Bergheim, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gottfried von Jülich 31 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Kleve 23. Sie hat um 1349 in Deutschland Frederick VII von Leiningen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Oktober 1387 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jolanthe von Jülich è nata il circa 1330 nel Kreis Bergheim, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, sua padre, Gottfried von Jülich, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth von Kleve, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Frederick VII von Leiningen circa 1349, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1387, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jolanthe von Jülichが約1330年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレイス バーグヘイムで生まれた時，父Gottfried von Jülichは31歳，母Elisabeth von Kleveは23歳であった。約1349年にドイツでFrederick VII von Leiningenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年10月31日に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jolanthe von Jülich(이)가 대략 1330년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 크레이스 버게이임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gottfried von Jülich(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Kleve(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1349년 독일에서 Frederick VII von Leiningen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 10월 31일 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Frederick VII von Leiningen aproximadamente 1349, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1387, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jolanthe von Jülich родилась около 1330 г. в местности крис биргим, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Gottfried von Jülich было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Kleve, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederick VII von Leiningen около 1349 г. в местности Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 октября 1387 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Frederick VII von Leiningen aproximadamente 1349, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1387, a la edad de 58 años.
